args.Description: "Merge real schedules with virtual member slots in JadwalPublicController show method."
args.Instruction: "Call mergeWithVirtualMemberSlots for booked_jadwals in show method of JadwalPublicController."
args.ReplacementContent:
"        // Ambil booking yang sudah ada (dipesan, pending, ditutup)
        $booked_jadwals = Jadwal::where('lapangan_id', $lapanganId)
            ->where('tanggal', $tanggal)
            ->whereIn('status', ['dipesan', 'pending', 'ditutup'])
            ->get();
        $booked_jadwals = Jadwal::mergeWithVirtualMemberSlots($booked_jadwals, $tanggal);"
args.TargetContent:
"        // Ambil booking yang sudah ada (dipesan, pending, ditutup)
        $booked_jadwals = Jadwal::where('lapangan_id', $lapanganId)
            ->where('tanggal', $tanggal)
            ->whereIn('status', ['dipesan', 'pending', 'ditutup'])
            ->get();"
args.toolAction: "Merging member slots in public schedules show"
